description: Icon set system (v1.7.0). Build on v1.6.0's Material-Symbols icons: add a user-selectable ICON SET as a new axis (like the theme system), PLUS an Auto mode that matches each era. NEW AXIS: a persisted `ft-icons` setting + `data-icons` attribute on <html>. SETS: 'outlined' (Material Symbols Outlined — current default), 'rounded' (Material Symbols Rounded — modern), 'filled' (2014-flavored solid Material — authentic to Material's 2014 launch; source carefully — post-2014 icons like dark_mode/light_mode need era-appropriate substitutes since they didn't exist in 2014), 'emoji' (restore the original ::before emoji per icon), and 'auto'. AUTO MODE maps era->set: 2005->emoji, 2009->emoji, 2014->filled, 2021->rounded (delivers the 'fits the era' feel; period-flavored — emoji is the casual stand-in for the pre-Material eras, filled/rounded Material are genuinely period-right for 2014/2021). MECHANISM: the .icon-* classes stay; `data-icons` selects the mask-image source per set (e.g. [data-icons='rounded'] .icon-home { mask-image: url(/assets/icons/rounded/home.svg) }) or restores emoji ::before for the emoji set (turning the mask off). Bundle the vector sets under public/assets/icons/<set>/ (Apache-2.0 attribution). Vector sets theme via currentColor; emoji set is colorful (expected). A theme REGISTRY-style icon-set registry drives the settings picker (add a set = one entry + one CSS block + the SVGs). SETTINGS UI: an 'Icons' picker in the Appearance section of setup.html, next to the theme picker. FOUC: the inline <head> bootstrap must also set data-icons (and resolve auto->era) before paint, kept in sync with the JS resolver. PERSISTENCE + default: ft-icons key; discovery to recommend the default (Auto delivers the vision but changes v1.6.0's uniform outlined look; Outlined preserves it — pick + justify). The header light/dark toggle + theme picker are unchanged; this is an orthogonal 3rd appearance axis (theme x mode x icon-set). Keep the gold ★ ratings out of it. Additive/no-regression. Significant two-reviewer QA (all sets x 8 theme combos, auto era-mapping, FOUC, emoji-fallback correctness, a11y labels still intact, no missing icon in any set).

history.note: Feature initiated via /kickoff. New feature icon-sets (Icon Set System (per-era + toggle), v1.7.0). BOOTSTRAP ONLY: no discovery/design content produced and no specialist agents invoked this turn. Before bootstrapping, finalized the prior shipped feature: Real Icon Assets (icon-assets) shipped as v1.6.0. Copied docs/exec-plans/active/icon-assets.md to docs/exec-plans/completed/icon-assets.md with a COMPLETED/Shipped-v1.6.0 tombstone header, all acceptance criteria checked off, and a '2026-07-05: Shipped v1.6.0' Progress-log entry recording the two-reviewer QA outcome (APPROVE-WITH-NITS), the /code-review a11y catch (icon-only header buttons lost accessible names -> aria-labels added across 3 pages), the @supports mask fallback, the squared sidebar icon box, and the added CI tests (bundled-SVGs / no-CDN / no-stray-emoji / served-200). This toolset cannot true-`mv`, so the active copy at docs/exec-plans/active/icon-assets.md remains as a stale tombstone to be `git rm`'d by the main loop. Overlap check: no active exec plans block icon-sets — the only file in docs/exec-plans/active/ is the icon-assets tombstone (being retired) plus .gitkeep. icon-sets is a direct, additive extension of the v1.6.0 icon system: it keeps every .icon-* class and mask-image contract that icon-assets established and layers a new orthogonal `data-icons` axis on top, so it must NOT regress the shipped outlined-icon rendering, the currentColor theming, the a11y aria-labels, or the gold-star exclusion. Tech-debt tracker (docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md) checked and left UNTOUCHED: Active table empty; Closed #1 (unbounded transcode-cache, resolved by avi-ux-refinement) is unrelated to this icon/theming work.

Bootstrapped and staged for discovery. Slug icon-sets, v1.7.0 additive appearance feature that adds a user-selectable ICON SET as a new orthogonal axis (theme x mode x icon-set) on top of v1.6.0's Material Symbols icon system, PLUS an Auto mode that matches each era. Description captured verbatim in state.description. KEY POINTS from the request (for the product-manager to ground in real code, not just this text): (1) NEW AXIS = a persisted `ft-icons` key + a `data-icons` attribute on <html>, mirroring how the existing theme/mode axes work (resolveTheme/initTheme/applyTheme in public/js/common.js, data-theme/data-mode attributes, the FOUC inline <head> bootstrap). (2) SETS: 'outlined' (current v1.6.0 default), 'rounded' (Material Symbols Rounded, modern), 'filled' (2014-flavored solid Material — source carefully; post-2014 glyphs like dark_mode/light_mode didn't exist in 2014 and need era-appropriate substitutes), 'emoji' (restore the original ::before emoji per icon — i.e. the pre-v1.6.0 rendering), and 'auto'. (3) AUTO era->set mapping: 2005->emoji, 2009->emoji, 2014->filled, 2021->rounded. (4) MECHANISM: keep the .icon-* classes; `data-icons` selects the per-set mask-image source (e.g. [data-icons='rounded'] .icon-home { mask-image: url(/assets/icons/rounded/home.svg) }) or, for the emoji set, turns the mask off and restores the ::before emoji content. (5) BUNDLING: vector sets under public/assets/icons/<set>/ with Apache-2.0 attribution (extends the existing public/assets/icons/ + README.md precedent); vector sets theme via currentColor, emoji set is intentionally colorful. (6) A theme-REGISTRY-style icon-set registry should drive the settings picker so adding a set = one registry entry + one CSS block + the SVGs. (7) SETTINGS UI: a new 'Icons' picker in the Appearance section of setup.html, next to the existing theme picker. (8) FOUC: the inline <head> bootstrap must ALSO set data-icons (resolving auto->era) before paint, kept in sync with the JS resolver. (9) PERSISTENCE + DEFAULT: ft-icons key; DISCOVERY MUST RECOMMEND + JUSTIFY the default — Auto delivers the era-matching vision but changes v1.6.0's uniform outlined look; Outlined preserves the shipped look. (10) EXPLICIT KEEPS/OUT-OF-SCOPE: the header light/dark toggle and the theme picker are UNCHANGED; the gold ★ rating stars stay out of the icon system entirely (as in v1.6.0); additive / no-regression. Significant two-reviewer QA required (all sets x 8 theme combos, auto era-mapping correctness, FOUC has no wrong-icon flash, emoji-fallback correctness, a11y aria-labels from v1.6.0 still intact, no missing icon in any set). Artifacts remain null (fresh feature — no requirements/design/exec_plan yet). Awaiting /prep-pm-discover to route the product-manager. BOOTSTRAP ONLY this turn.

Product-manager discovery complete. Exec plan written to docs/exec-plans/active/icon-sets.md; artifacts.requirements and artifacts.exec_plan set to that path. Grounded in public/css/style.css (.icon-* mask rules + @supports fill guard + icon-star exclusion), public/js/common.js (THEME_REGISTRY/resolveTheme/applyTheme/setTheme/toggleTheme/updateNavThemeItem pattern to mirror), the inline FOUC <head> scripts on index/setup/watch.html, public/assets/icons/README.md (Apache-2.0 bundling precedent), setup.html's Appearance section, and the completed docs/exec-plans/completed/icon-assets.md (recovered the exact pre-v1.6.0 emoji-per-icon mapping the new 'emoji' set restores: home/folder/cog/delete/moon/sun/menu/search/play/refresh/arrow-up/arrow-down). No conflicts: docs/exec-plans/active/ has no other active plan; tech-debt-tracker.md Active table is empty and unaffected. Key discovery decisions: (a) Sourced the 2014 'filled' set's two glyphs with no 2014 counterpart — dark_mode -> substitute wb_sunny (icon-sun) and brightness_2 (icon-moon) — documented with rationale and flagged for build-time asset-availability verification. (b) Recommended default ft-icons = 'outlined' (not 'auto') specifically because Auto's own era->set map would flip the default-era (2021) majority's out-of-the-box icons from Outlined to Rounded unprompted, which is a bigger surface change than an additive/opt-in feature should make; Auto stays listed first in the picker and one click away. Migration: resolveIconSet(null, <any era>) always resolves to 'outlined', so every existing user's icons are pixel-identical after upgrade regardless of era. (c) Kept the existing top-level public/assets/icons/*.svg files as-is for the 'outlined' source (no move to a subdirectory) to avoid churn/broken-reference risk; left open for principal-engineer to revisit. Specified resolveIconSet(storedSet, era) as the pure node:test seam (11 required cases enumerated, mirroring test/unit/resolve-theme.test.js's style/pattern exactly) and required CI guards (bundled+served rounded/filled SVGs, no-CDN grep, a re-scoped no-stray-emoji grep that now excludes style.css since it will intentionally contain the 12 emoji strings for the emoji set). Flagged top risks: FOUC-script/resolveIconSet drift, Auto not recomputing on era change unless setTheme() is wired to re-run applyIconSet, the @supports currentColor fill guard needing explicit neutralization under [data-icons='emoji'] to avoid a double-rendered square behind the emoji glyph, a11y aria-label regression risk (same buttons that regressed in icon-assets), and CSS combinatorial discipline (reuse the shared base rule, only add per-set mask-image blocks + one emoji override block). Required a significant two-reviewer QA pass per the QA note. Design and Task breakdown sections left blank for principal-engineer / engineering-manager.
